title: Bind Pizzeria
description: Pizza menu for actions like key binds and chat messages
body:
# Pizzeria!

This mod adds highly customizable pizza menu on which you can add different actions. 
![Action Wheel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uHMZCCst/images/21c94e787b6368851a8abf03c696bf689bc589a1.png)
After installing mod you can bind pizza menu on any button

Initially it will be empty so you will need to configure it using button.

In this menu you can split any slice (by right click) , delete it (using red circle in center), and change its properties like name, icon, color, position and most important: actions.

Every slice has left and right click action. Actions define behaviour when activated. Out of the box two action types are avaliable: keybind action and chat message/command. 

Keybind action allows you to bind some actions to this wheel instead of key. 
Chat message action allows you to send any chat messages or commands

![Configuration Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uHMZCCst/images/5fce91f2c605722060ebf3fabf421dbb208274b7.png)

Mod also adds small api that allows you add new action types, more info in github readme

Warning: this mod may not work with some mods that use different way to detect keybinds. But most mods are probably compatible. By the way if you find some mod incompatible with this you can make issue on github and i will try my best to fix it
